feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01 VAT refund XML file for Belgium
entry.content:
Hello @Teddy_CARVALHO 

thank you for reaching out in the SAP Community. 

You can find information about VAT Return runs for Belgium in the SAP Help Portal here. You can also define the output layout in the Prepare Electronic Tax Return app as described in this Help topic. 

I hope this helps.

Best regards,

Anja

entry.title: what is the retention period for the job logs in application job application?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We plan to utilize the Application Job feature to execute standard jobs within the system.

Could you please let us know what is the retention period of the spool and the log of standard job?

Thanks

entry.title: What is the reorganization run and when does it take place?
entry.content:
Dear Community,
for testing different pricing strategies in purchasing (Public Cloud), I have created a variant condition in the purchasing info record. To test my custom condition type, I have set the deletion flag for the previously created variant condition. Now I would like to reactivate this same variant condition, however, I cannot untick deletion indicator (as expected) but I also cannot create a second line with the same Material/Variant/Validity combo. Clicking on F1 for the deletion indicator, it gives me the following information: 

My questions is: What is the reorganization run and when does it take place? Can I somehow trigger the run manually, so that I can re-create my variant condition?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Business catalog SAP_FIN_BC_GL_REPORTING_DE_PC is missing
entry.content:
The business catalog for General Ledger Reporting for PERSON_NAME (SAP_FIN_BC_GL_REPORTING_DE_PC ) is missing in the role template General Ledger Accountant.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get trail mail for audit log of BOM in S4HC?
entry.content:
We need audit trails for the internal audit team. And one of the requirement is change log for BOM's.
Kindly let us know how this dump can be accessed?

*Note - Change versions for BOM are not maintained


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GR/IR Clearing Open Items - Manual postings to GR/IR accounts aren't allowed.
entry.content:
GR/IR Clearing Open Items.

the GR/IR GL is made into non automatic posting account, within GL master. For the manual entry posting to clearing the GR/IR open item which are related to the previous year.

When I tried posting the manual entry to GR/IR account it is not allowing to make entry by showing the below error.

Using app Post General Journal Entries for GR/IR Clearing account Error Manual postings to GR/IR accounts aren't allowed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Display Original Duplicate Triplicate on Delivery challan output form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working with Adobe Forms in S/4HANA Public Cloud, we developed delivery challan output form in such a way that

when we click on preview we have to get four copies . It was done.

And now client requirement is we have to display as

 

  • Original on first copy

  • Duplicate on second copy

  • Triplicate on third copy

  • Extra Copy on fourth copy

Note :  I have placed header and footer part in master page.

How can i do this . please guide me.

Thanks

Sarat.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start via SAP Start Booster – No Apps or Products Showing Post Setup (Foundation Plan)
entry.content:
Hi @sapcommunity  & @sapexperts 

We are currently working on enabling access to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Fiori applications via the SAP Mobile Start app, using the SAP Start booster in SAP BTP. However, we are facing an issue where no content appears on the SAP Start launchpad—even though the setup completes successfully.

Initial Approach – Manual Configuration

Initially, we tried to manually expose S/4HANA content to SAP Build Work Zone (Foundation Plan):

  • Verified that relevant business catalogs were marked as “Available for SAP Build Work Zone / SAP Start.”

  • Ensured that business roles were properly configured and exposed to SAP BTP.

Challenge:
Due to limitations of the Foundation Plan, we were unable to access the Content Manager or assign roles in the Site Directory, which prevented us from proceeding further with manual setup.

References Followed:
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA/importing-content-to-sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition-2-2

Alternative Approach – SAP Start Booster

To overcome these constraints, we executed the “Set Up SAP Start” Booster from SAP BTP. The booster ran successfully and completed the following:

  • ✅ Created the BTP subaccount, assigned entitlements, and configured trust.

  • ✅ Subscribed to SAP Build Work Zone – Foundation Plan.

  • ✅ Configured destinations to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

  • ✅ Created the default SAP Start site.

  • ✅ Set up SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS and IPS).

  • ✅ Integrated the S/4HANA Cloud system automatically.

As a result, the SAP Start site is now accessible via both desktop and the SAP Mobile Start app.

References Followed:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/setting-up-sap-start-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13573816

Current Issue

Despite the successful booster execution:

  • ⚠️ SAP Start site shows the message:
    “Currently, there aren’t any products for you. Please check back again later.”

  • ⚠️ No Fiori apps or S/4HANA content is visible in the launchpad.

Troubleshooting Performed

We have already validated the following:

  • 🔹 Trust configuration between BTP and IAS is correctly set.

  • 🔹 Users are provisioned and mapped properly via IPS.

  • 🔹 Exposed business catalogs and roles in S/4HANA.

  • 🔹 Booster completed without any reported errors.

  • 🔹 Attempted to recheck destinations and Channel Manager (though limited under Foundation Plan).

  • 🔹 Tried accessing SAP Start from both desktop and mobile, same result.

Request for Help / Clarifications

We’d appreciate your support with the following:

  1. Is there any missing step required to make the apps visible after the booster setup?

  2. Does the Foundation Plan impose any limitation that restricts content visibility in SAP Start?

  3. Would upgrading to SAP Build Work Zone – Standard Plan be required for full SAP Start functionality?

  4. Can anyone who successfully implemented SAP Mobile Start via Foundation Plan share insights?

Any pointers or confirmations from the SAP team or community experts would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
Nithesh T S

entry.title: Change GL and Movement Type manually when request material for reservations via PM order
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like to change GL and Movement type for PM order when requesting a reservations.

How can I do this?

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Retention policy of message logs (Message Monitoring Overview App)
entry.content:
Hello team,

what is the retention policy of message logs in Message Monitoring Overview app in S/4Hana public cloud?

entry.title: Whitescreen after logging in Public cloud with Zebra scanner (via Velocity)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m facing an issue when trying to connect to SAP Public Cloud using Velocity on a Zebra MC330K handheld scanner (Android 8).

After launching the Velocity session and entering login credentials, the screen turns completely white and doesn’t proceed. This issue cannot be debugged directly in Velocity.

Here’s what I’ve already checked:

  • The root cause seems to be an outdated Chromium WebView (version 67).

  • I tested with the standard Chromium browser deployed via Zebra StageNow/ADB (also version 67), and the issue persists.

  • The device is running with Zebra Enterprise Home Screen, so I have no direct access to standard Android settings or the Play Store to update Chromium.

Has anyone faced something similar?
Is there a recommended approach to update the Chromium WebView on these Zebra devices — or an alternative way to run SAP Fiori apps in such constrained environments? Could the solution be try to push Zebra enterprise browser to the scanner?

entry.title: Change a GL account assigned to this activity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Does anybody know how can I solve the following problem?

In the test system we were running some tests and we have created new activity type T036 and we didn’t change a GL account assigned to this activity.  We have created a project, assigned an employee and input some hours.  These hours weren’t posted because a GL account was blocked. 

We changed a GL account in Manage Activity type APP for a right one. 

 

We have created new rates in the APP manage cost rates services

 

But Input the time again in the same project, we have the same error that GL account is blocked.

 

 

When I check the app where -used list activity Types, I can see that this activity type participates in Sending Cost centers in Cost rate Maintenance

 

And when I navigate inside I can see that I have 4 rates and only one with GL account I needed 6290000012

 

 

But in APP manage cost rates services

I have only 2 rates maintained:

 

 

¿Does anybody know how to solve this problem?

 

Thank you

entry.title: 导入手工银行对账单后，进行过账处理，未能按照所建规则进行处理过账到预付账款，而是过账到应付账款，系统配置原因处理？
entry.content:
#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#导入手工银行对账单后，进行过账处理，未能按照所建规则进行处理过账到预付账款，而是过账到应付账款，系统配置原因处理

1.建立导入对账单处理规则，如下图：

2.导入银行对账单，如下图：

3.过账银行对账单，过账结果如下图：

4.查询导入对账单形成凭证，仍旧形成的是应付账款，而非确定规则想要的预付账款，如下图：


如何确定规则形成预付账款，而非应付；

entry.title: App ID "F5746" Customer Data Browser object group
entry.content:
Dear all,

I want to register an object group to control what is displayed in Customer Data Browser. I looked at the sap help, assigned the required role "SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT", and confirmed that the target IAM app "S_YI3_39000590_TRAN" is enabled.

There should be no problem with the conditions required for the settings of other systems.

The SSCUI app in question was released in 2502 and is an app permission variant type app, so will this be a bug?

Please let me know if there are any other measures that need to be taken.

regards,

entry.title: SOAP API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) did not return result or show error via postman
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to implement the "Post Incoming Payment" functionality in the API, for which I found two main SOAP APIs related to this function, namely Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) and Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous).

Regarding the Post part, after referring to the examples, it quickly completed creation normally; I was able to create DZ and DR type Journal Entries successfully and find them in the system. However, when I tried to use the Clearing API, I used two matching DR and DZ documents. Postman only returned "202 Accepted" and there were no further return values.

From the documentation, I learned that SAP should return a Confirmation request to indicate the final execution result. I set up a WebHook to receive any possible return requests, but I did not receive any requests. Moreover, when I tried to look for the execution results of this request within the system, I couldn’t find any error messages or detailed information about the execution results in the SOAP Error Log or Message Monitoring application.

What I want to know is: how can I view these specific execution results (in the SAP system or through API returns)? Is there an error in my approach to using the Clearing interface?

entry.title: Professional services. Employee time with Sales price 0.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Our client use Professional services and Time and expenses contract type. Employees who participate in project input their hours and then they company bill them to client. We use project specific prices for each employee for each project (Manage Prices- sales, PCP0) y condition table 040

 

 

What we have noticed, and we would like to know if it’s a standard behavior when we have a Sales price 0, SAP includes this posting in Billing document and make a billing rate equal with cost rate.  For example:

 

For some of employee categories our client would like to see at the project costs but not income and also this costs shouldn’t generate revenue recognition. We saw that there is an option no mark this  person assignment as Non-billable. In this case SAP doesn't create Revenue recognition posting. 

The problem is that when we already have actual costs (time recorder), we can not switch from billable to non-billable element.  

The only thing that occurred to us, it’s a create an additional WBS  element  for this employees  and mark them there as non-billable. 

We don’t think it’s the best solution and really hope that SAP has for this case better options.

Does anybody had a similar situation?  Any solutions?

Thank you,

entry.title: System not allowing to change Supplier number/code after creation of PO
entry.content:
How to change vendor or Supplier Number/code after creation of PO?

entry.title: API for Settlement rule creation in WBS Element
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there a standard API to create the settlement rule in WBS element by mass upload. 

Best Regards,

Channa

entry.title: Custom condition type is not visible in PO - Landed Costs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have set up custom condition type for Custom Duty, so it can be added to the material price ( customer is using moving average),  i have set up calculation schema for purchasing, I have used existing Account key ( as i cant set up new one), it seems that I have done what needed to be done but condition is still not visible in the PO line items, so potentially I am missing something but cant workout what exactly is missing. Can someone please help?

 

Thanks

Barbara

entry.title: Assigning Managers to Workers with Different Company Codes in Work Agreement Field "Manager"
entry.content:
We recently had the following question: "How to assign Managers outside of your Company Code? As whenever I click on the Manager field, only the Managers from the same Company Code are visible."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
